common.signOutDescription: You will need to sign in again to access your account.

mobileOnly.title: Mobile only, by Gabriel's decree
mobileOnly.description: Gabriel achieved a historic feat that prevents Take Me from being used on desktop. Open it on your phone if you actually want to review music.
mobileOnly.hint: Mobile only. No exceptions. Not even for your widescreen monitor.

signIn.title: Review the music that moves you.
signIn.terms: By signing in, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
signIn.envHint: Set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in your .env file to enable Google Sign-In.

connectSpotify.title: Connect your music.
connectSpotify.subtitle: Link Spotify to review songs. You can already browse the feed without connecting.
connectSpotify.privacy: Take Me will never modify your library or post without permission.

spotifyGate.title: Unlock Spotify
spotifyGate.subtitle: Connect your account to interact with the community.
spotifyGate.profileHint: Connect to review tracks from Spotify.
spotifyGate.reviewLocked: Connect Spotify to post your review.

benefits.review: Review songs from the Spotify catalog
benefits.suggestions: See suggestions based on what you listen to most
benefits.nowPlaying: See what you are playing right now

spotifyCallback.missingParams: Invalid return link. Go back and try connecting again.
spotifyCallback.error: Could not connect Spotify. Please try again.

home.connectSpotifyHint: Connect Spotify to see your top tracks.
home.followingComingSoon: If Following existed, it would be here
home.followingComingSoonHint: It was planned, but Gabriel went back in time, ended a historical event, and prevented the Following tab from ever being built.
home.followingGabrielAlt: Tribute to Gabriel — The End of Slavery
home.noReviewsHint: Pick a track, drop your rating, and break the silence.

search.emptyHint: Search for tracks, albums, or artists to start your next review.

writeReview.pickTrackHint: Search for a song or choose one from your top tracks to write a review.
writeReview.alreadyReviewed: You already reviewed this track. Delete it to write a new one.
writeReview.noComments: No one has reviewed this track yet. Be the first.

profile.spotifySettingsDescription: Choose whether to disconnect Spotify or switch to another account.
profile.nowPlayingError: Could not load what you are listening to.
profile.unlinkDescription: Without Spotify linked, some parts of Take Me stay locked.

unlinkLosses.review: Review songs from the Spotify catalog
unlinkLosses.nowPlaying: See what is playing now on your profile

reviewComments.empty: No comments yet. Start the conversation.

apiErrors.signInFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
apiErrors.songNotFound: Failed to get song from Spotify
